case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. ANDREA CLARK ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66392955)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-27-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ANDREA DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-03-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-30-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-11-2021
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-03-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-17-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-17-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
